r2|	j
    Must be called during type analysis, as analyse is called
    on the dtype argument.
    posargs and dictargs should consist of a list and a dict
    of tuples (value, pos). Defaults should be a dict of values.
    Returns a dict containing all the options a buffer can have and
    its value (with the positions stripped).

__Pyx_GetBufferAndValidate(&%(pybuffernd_struct)s.rcbuffer->pybuffer, (PyObject*)%(obj_cname)s, &%(dtype_typeinfo)s, %(flags)s, %(ndim)d, %(cast)d, __pyx_stack))
get_type_information_cnamerA
locals)	r
Z	obj_cnamerE
dtype_typeinfor
    Generate code for reassigning a buffer variables. This only deals with getting
    the buffer auxiliary structure and variables set up correctly, the assignment
    itself and refcounting is the responsibility of the caller.
    However, the assignment operation may throw an exception so that the reassignment
    never happens.
    Depending on the circumstances there are two possible outcomes:
    - Old buffer released, new acquired, rhs assigned to lhs
    - Old buffer released, new acquired which fails, reaqcuire old lhs buffer
      (which may or may not succeed).
    r
manage_refz
%s = %s;
	if (%s) {
%s < 0c
	funcstate
allocate_tempr
py_object_type)
	<genexpr>
z'put_assign_to_buffer.<locals>.<genexpr>

z/Py_XDECREF(%s); Py_XDECREF(%s); Py_XDECREF(%s);z!__Pyx_RaiseBufferFallbackError();z
} else {z
PyErr_Restore(%s, %s, %s);r
%s = %s = %s = 0;zA%s = %s; __Pyx_INCREF(Py_None); %s.rcbuffer->pybuffer.buf = NULL;Z

typecastr

put)
Z	lhs_cnameZ	rhs_cnamer
is_initializedr6
retcode_cnameZ	exc_temps
put_assign_to_buffera
    Generates code to process indices and calculate an offset into
    a buffer. Returns a C string which gives a pointer which can be
    read from or written to at will (it is an expression so caller should
    store it in a temporary if it is used more than once).
    As the bounds checking can have any number of combinations of unsigned
    arguments, smart optimizations etc. we insert it directly in the function
    body. The lookup however is delegated to a inline function that is instantiated
    once per ndim (lookup with suboffsets tend to get quite complicated).
    entry is a BufferEntry
    Z
wraparoundZ
boundscheckFr
%s = -1;r
if (%s < 0) {z	%s += %s;z
if (%s) %s = %d;r
%s = %d;z
} else 
(size_t)z
%s >= %s%sZ __Pyx_RaiseBufferIndexErrorNogilZ
__Pyx_RaiseBufferIndexErrorr
%s != -1z
%s(%s);r
if (%s < 0) %s += %s;)
	enumeraterc

put_buffer_lookup_code
buffer_struct_declare_code
    Generates a buffer lookup function for the right number
    of dimensions. The function gives back a void* at the right location.
    r
i%d, s%d, o%dr
z(buf_lookup_full_code.<locals>.<listcomp>z1#define %s(type, buf, %s) (type)(%s_imp(buf, %s))c
z.Py_ssize_t i%d, Py_ssize_t s%d, Py_ssize_t o%dr
z1static CYTHON_INLINE void* %s_imp(void* buf, %s);zf
        static CYTHON_INLINE void* %s_imp(void* buf, %s) {
          char* ptr = (char*)buf;
        r
zX          ptr += s%d * i%d;
          if (o%d >= 0) ptr = *((char**)ptr) + o%d;
        r
return ptr;
proto
definr/

z	i%d * s%dr
z1#define %s(type, buf, %s) (type)((char*)buf + %s)N)
args
offsetr
    Similar to strided lookup, but can assume that the last dimension
    doesn't need a multiplication as long as.
    Still we keep the same signature for now.
    r
.#define %s(type, buf, i0, s0) ((type)buf + i0)r
z%buf_lookup_c_code.<locals>.<listcomp>r
9#define %s(type, buf, %s) ((type)((char*)buf + %s) + i%d)N
    Like C lookup, but the first index is optimized instead.
    r

specialization_name)
mangle_dtype_namek
    Output the run-time type information (__Pyx_TypeInfo) for given dtype,
    and return the name of the type info struct.
    Structs with two floats of the same size are encoded as complex numbers.
    One can separate between complex numbers declared as struct or with native
    encoding by inspecting to see if the fields field of the type is
    filled in.
    z
__Pyx_TypeInfo_%sz
__Pyx_StructFields_%sz
<error>Nr
